description: ATOMIC-1 (specs 00 §11.1.7, 09 §9): the canonical avax.UTXO an X-Chain ExportTx places into shared memory (Element.value), proven to decode byte-identically on the P-Chain. The value bytes are the secp256k1fx.TransferOutput UTXO marshalled with the avm txs.Codec under CodecVersion 0; the SAME bytes are read back through the real ava-chains shared-memory channel by the P-Chain view and unmarshalled by ava_platformvm::utxo::Utxo.
provenance: Derived from the Go encoding: vms/components/avax/utxo.go (UTXO = UTXOID{TxID,OutputIndex} ‖ Asset{ID} ‖ Out), vms/avm/txs/executor/executor.go ExportTx (Element.Key = utxo.InputID()[:], Element.Value = Codec.Marshal(CodecVersion=0, utxo), Element.Traits = out.Addresses()), vms/secp256k1fx (TransferOutput = Amt u64 ‖ OutputOwners{Locktime u64, Threshold u32, Addrs []ShortID}), secp256k1fx.TransferOutput registered at type_id 7 on BOTH the avm (vms/avm/txs/codec.go) and the platformvm (vms/platformvm/txs/codec.go), and chains/atomic/element.go. Byte-layout-faithful; pending live two-binary oracle confirmation (gated on the unfinished differential LockstepDriver, task X.13/X.15).
byte_layout: 0000 | txID(32) | outputIndex(u32-be) | assetID(32) | typeID=00000007 | amt(u64-be) | locktime(u64-be) | threshold(u32-be) | addrCount(u32-be) | addr(20)
